hero.thesis: Launch a Done-For-You domain warmup and cold email setup service for B2B agencies, leveraging automation to charge $1.5k retainers.
hero.marketSize: The B2B cold email market is a $2 billion industry with thousands of agencies seeking hassle-free solutions.
hero.payingEvidence: Agencies are spending $1k-$5k monthly on cold email solutions, proven by services like Lemlist and Mailshake.

actions.action: Register your LLC using Stripe Atlas to formalize your business.
actions.success: LLC is registered and official documents received.

actions.action: Open a business bank account and set up Stripe for payments.
actions.success: Stripe account is functional and linked to your bank.

actions.action: Research and join 3 B2B agency-focused LinkedIn groups.
actions.success: Join requests approved and first posts scheduled.

ninetyDay.title: Build Service Offering

actions.action: Draft a service outline in Notion detailing your DFY domain warmup processes.
actions.success: Service outline completed with clear deliverables.

actions.action: Create pricing tiers and packages in Notion.
actions.success: Pricing tiers finalized for starter, growth, and premium.

actions.action: Design a landing page using Webflow highlighting your service benefits.
actions.success: Landing page live with all information and CTA.

ninetyDay.metric: Service offering and landing page completed.

ninetyDay.title: Acquire Initial Leads

actions.action: Compile a list of 100 potential B2B agency contacts using Apollo.
actions.success: 100 target contacts with verified emails collected.

actions.action: Draft outreach email template in ConvertKit.
actions.success: Email template ready for campaign launch.

actions.action: Send first batch of 20 cold emails to agency leads.
actions.success: 20 emails sent, track opens and responses.

ninetyDay.metric: First 20 emails sent and tracking initiated.

actions.action: Analyze email campaign metrics using ConvertKit.
actions.success: Open and reply rates analyzed.

actions.action: Revise email template based on feedback and metrics.
actions.success: Email template optimized for better engagement.

actions.action: Update Webflow landing page with testimonials or case studies if available.
actions.success: Landing page enhanced with social proof.

ninetyDay.title: Scale Outreach

actions.action: Automate email sequences using n8n, set for 3 follow-ups.
actions.success: Automation setup for follow-ups with 3 sequences.

actions.action: Expand LinkedIn network by connecting with 50 new agency owners.
actions.success: 50 new connections added to LinkedIn.

actions.action: Schedule a webinar on cold email strategies for B2B agencies via Zoom.
actions.success: Webinar scheduled and promoted to network.

ninetyDay.metric: 50 new connections, automation in place, and webinar scheduled.

actions.action: Identify warm leads from previous outreach and schedule calls using Calendly.
actions.success: Call slots filled with potential clients.

actions.action: Conduct sales calls focusing on pain points and your solution.
actions.success: 3 sales calls completed.

actions.action: Send proposal templates via ConvertKit to interested leads.
actions.success: Proposals sent to interested prospects.

ninetyDay.title: Onboard Clients

actions.action: Finalize contracts using Lovable and send for e-signature.
actions.success: Contracts sent and signed by clients.

actions.action: Set up client accounts in Notion for project management.
actions.success: Client accounts set up and shared.

actions.action: Begin domain warmup process for new clients using Instantly.
actions.success: Domain warmup initiated for all clients.

ninetyDay.metric: First client onboarded and service execution begun.

ninetyDay.title: Optimize Delivery

actions.action: Monitor domain health and email deliverability via Instantly.
actions.success: Deliverability metrics within target range.

actions.action: Implement feedback loop with clients via Notion forms.
actions.success: Feedback system established and operational.

actions.action: Prepare case study of a successful campaign for marketing use.
actions.success: Case study documented and ready to share.

ninetyDay.metric: Deliverability metrics optimized and case study published.

ninetyDay.title: Expand Marketing

actions.action: Launch a content marketing strategy using beehiiv for newsletters.
actions.success: Newsletter strategy and first issue launched.

actions.action: Engage with 3 B2B agency communities on Reddit to drive traffic.
actions.success: 3 valuable posts and comments made on Reddit.

actions.action: Collaborate with an influencer in the B2B space for a guest podcast.
actions.success: Podcast recording scheduled and promoted.

ninetyDay.metric: Newsletter subscribers growing and social traffic increased.

ninetyDay.title: Boost Retention

actions.action: Develop a loyalty program for existing clients using ConvertKit.
actions.success: Loyalty program details finalized and communicated.

actions.action: Host a virtual Q&A session for current clients via Zoom.
actions.success: Q&A session held and recorded.

actions.action: Conduct a survey for client satisfaction and gather testimonials.
actions.success: Feedback collected and testimonials secured.

ninetyDay.metric: Client satisfaction improved and testimonials gathered.

ninetyDay.title: Refine Processes

actions.action: Audit current workflows for efficiency using Notion templates.
actions.success: Workflow audit completed with improvements identified.

actions.action: Implement process improvements and document changes.
actions.success: Process changes implemented and documented.

actions.action: Train a virtual assistant to handle routine tasks.
actions.success: VA onboarded and handling routine tasks.

ninetyDay.metric: Increased operational efficiency and VA operational.

ninetyDay.title: Evaluate and Adjust

actions.action: Analyze financial performance against goals using spreadsheets.
actions.success: Financial analysis completed and insights gathered.

actions.action: Set new quarterly targets based on performance data.
actions.success: Quarterly targets set and documented.

actions.action: Plan next quarter’s strategy with potential service expansions.
actions.success: Strategic plan for next quarter developed.

ninetyDay.metric: Next quarter's strategy finalized and ready for execution.

toolStack.name: Stripe Atlas
toolStack.why: Register your LLC with ease and set up your business structure.

toolStack.name: Apollo
toolStack.why: Build a targeted list of potential leads with validated emails.
toolStack.pricing: Free tier available, paid plans start at $39/month

toolStack.name: ConvertKit
toolStack.why: Manage email campaigns and automate follow-ups.
toolStack.pricing: Free tier available, $29/month for advanced features

toolStack.name: Webflow
toolStack.why: Create and manage your landing page with no code.
toolStack.pricing: Free tier available, $12/month for basic hosting

toolStack.name: Notion
toolStack.why: Organize and manage your service processes and client projects.
toolStack.pricing: Free for personal use, $8/user/month for team features

toolStack.name: Instantly
toolStack.why: Manage domain warmup and monitor email deliverability.

toolStack.name: Calendly
toolStack.pricing: Basic free plan, $8/user/month for premium features

firstTenCustomers.script:
Subject: Boost Your Cold Email Success, [Name]!

Hi [Name],

I help B2B agencies like [Niche] skyrocket their email campaigns with no-hassle domain warmups and tailored cold email setups. Agencies love our $1.5K retainer model for consistent results.

Let's chat about enhancing your outreach strategy. Can I schedule a quick call?

Best,
[Your Name]
firstTenCustomers.cadence: Send on Monday, follow-up on Wednesday, final nudge on Friday.

pricing.premium: $2,500/month full service with analytics and ongoing support
pricing.raisingRules: Increase pricing by 10% every six months as demand increases and testimonials grow.

failureModes: Overestimating demand without proper market validation.
Failing to automate processes leading to burnout.
Pricing too low, undermining perceived value.
Ignoring client feedback, losing repeat business.
Neglecting email deliverability metrics, harming client campaigns.
Overextending with too many clients at once.

setup.llc: Register through Stripe Atlas in one streamlined process.
setup.payments: Use Stripe to handle subscriptions and one-off payments seamlessly.
setup.contracts: Draft service agreements with Lovable for e-signatures.
setup.insurance: Consult with an insurance provider about professional liability coverage.

scaling: Once you hit $10,000 MRR, consider hiring an operational assistant to manage client onboarding and routine tasks, freeing you to focus on strategy and growth. As volume grows, invest in a part-time technical expert to enhance your service offerings, such as advanced deliverability setups or custom API integrations. Establish a formal feedback loop with clients to continually refine your processes and offer additional upsells, such as custom campaign strategies or one-on-one coaching sessions. Prioritize building a brand presence through content marketing, webinars, and partnerships to attract more inbound leads and reduce reliance on cold outreach over time.
